body.title: CC chat log ingestion through UnseenUniversity LoggingControlCenter interface
body.text:
# D-cc-log-logcontrol-conformance-2026-05-05
**title:** CC chat log ingestion through UnseenUniversity LoggingControlCenter interface
**date:** 2026-05-05
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-cc-log-handler-class, T-cc-log-stop-hook-wire

## Decision narrative
CC's JSONL transcript → markdown pipeline should route through UnseenUniversity's logging infrastructure rather than bespoke standalone scripts. The JSONL reader becomes the emitter, and a logging.Handler+Formatter subclass (in devices/claude/chat_log_handler.py) owns the output format. ClaudeDevice implements BaseDevice.logs(). Python logging is pub/sub — consumer formats, producer is format-agnostic. This eliminates the two-formatter mess (export_chat.py vs chat_log_formatter.py) and makes CC a first-class device in the log system. LoggingControlCenter extension NOT in scope — it already names CC.0 in its log tree layout.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-05-06T02:19:42.614850+00:00
**Ticket count:** 2 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-cc-log-handler-class (M) — CLOSED: CC chat log Handler+Formatter class in UnseenUniversity  `done` — ChatLogHandler+CCEventFormatter in devices/claude/chat_log_handler.py; ClaudeDevice.logs() returns CC.0 path; 27 tests; pushed abc6398
- T-cc-log-stop-hook-wire (S) — DESIGNED: Wire CC Stop hook to ChatLogHandler; retire chat_log_formatter.py  `done` — cc_log_stop_hook.py ships: searches all CC project dirs by mtime, ingests via ChatLogHandler.flush(); chat_log_formatter.py deleted; settings.json Stop hook updated. commit 8a097f2c

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
